{{CargoRelic
|name=Theremin
|class_id=22014
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAME
|birthday=03-05
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.03%), Wishing (0.01%)
|description=On Mar 5, 1920 AD, Lev Termin invented the world's first electronic musical instrument.<br>Theremin was invented by Lev Termin. It is the world's first electronic musical instrument. Unlike the modern version that has transistors and integrated circuits, it was completely driven by a motor and its functions were far from completion. But it was light and economic, setting the regular expensive, complex, and massive organ at a disadvantage. After it was invented, the development of electronic instruments skyrocketed. Merely 30 years later, almost as many electronic instruments as pianos were manufactured.
|fame=47
|art=32
|fth=18
|civ=26
|tech=31
|ss1=Zombie Minion ATK +1%
|ss2=Zombie Minion ATK +2%
|ss3=Zombie Minion ATK +3%
|ss4=Zombie Minion ATK +5%
|ss7=Zombie Minion ATK +5%<br>Zombie Minion ATK +5% (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Dungbeetle skill I.png|50px]]Place in Dung Beetle Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +1.5%
}}
